metrics.name: anchor_coverage
metrics.detail: Share of scenes with anchored zoom or highlight.

metrics.name: caption_balance
metrics.detail: Share of longer captions balanced into readable lines.

metrics.name: motion_confidence
metrics.detail: Average confidence of approved zoom moves.

metrics.name: timing_sync
metrics.detail: Share of focus scenes with detected action timing.

metrics.name: pacing_balance
metrics.detail: Whether scene durations stay readable without collapsing meaningful product moments.

metrics.name: narrative_continuity
metrics.detail: Whether adjacent scenes preserve a clean action-to-result walkthrough arc.

metrics.name: reference_style
metrics.detail: How closely the edit plan matches premium reference-style action choreography and readability.

metrics.name: cursor_commitment
metrics.detail: Whether cursor-led scenes visibly approach before they commit to the action.

metrics.name: highlight_finesse
metrics.detail: Whether highlights feel persistent and elegant instead of abrupt or decorative.

metrics.name: result_readability
metrics.detail: Whether important post-action states remain on screen long enough to read cleanly.

metrics.name: grounding_health
metrics.detail: Whether the walkthrough structure is sufficiently grounded for the source duration.

metrics.name: review_debt
metrics.detail: How much unresolved manual review debt is still present.

metrics.name: quality_gate
metrics.detail: Quality-report readiness after review and refinement.
